creator: bu7cher@yandex.ru
text:
Hi, All.

Can you try to boot in safe mode or with APIC disabled?
Several people reported that disabling APIC helped them.
To disable APIC, you can use in boot command prompt
hint.apic.0.disabled="1"

Also did you try to boot FreeBSD 7.0 amd64?
-- 
WBR, Andrey V. Elsukov
